requirement: Protocol must define primary endpoint consistently throughout all sections
extract_instruction: Find ALL text in the protocol that defines or mentions the primary endpoint, primary outcome, or primary efficacy measure. Return every relevant passage.
fail_conditions: no primary endpoint definition found
two or more sections define primary endpoint differently
primary endpoint definitions are contradictory
pass_conditions: primary endpoint defined clearly and consistently in all sections

requirement: Study population age range must be stated consistently across all sections
extract_instruction: Find ALL text mentioning age range, age criteria, age limit, or participant age in any section including abstract, synopsis, study population, and inclusion criteria.
fail_conditions: different age ranges stated in different sections
age range in abstract differs from inclusion criteria
age range missing from key sections
pass_conditions: same age range stated consistently across all sections

requirement: Enrollment targets must be consistent between all protocol sections
extract_instruction: Find ALL text mentioning number of participants, sample size, enrollment target, number of subjects across all sections.
fail_conditions: different enrollment numbers in different sections
enrollment target contradictory between sections
pass_conditions: consistent enrollment number across all sections

requirement: Randomisation and blinding descriptions must be consistent across all sections
extract_instruction: Find ALL text mentioning randomisation, randomization, blinding, masking, open-label across all sections.
fail_conditions: blinding described differently in different sections
study described as both blinded and open-label
pass_conditions: randomisation and blinding described consistently
no randomisation planned and stated consistently

requirement: Protocol must designate a qualified Medical Monitor with full contact information
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning Medical Monitor, medical monitor designation, medical oversight, or sponsor medical contact. Return the exact text found.
fail_conditions: no mention of medical monitor
medical monitor section contains placeholder like 'provide name' or 'TBD'
medical monitor mentioned but no name or contact provided
section blank or incomplete
pass_conditions: medical monitor designated with specific name and contact information

requirement: Protocol must reference the current Investigator Brochure or equivalent device document
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning Investigator Brochure, IB, device information document, or investigational product documentation reference.
fail_conditions: no mention of Investigator Brochure anywhere
investigational product section does not reference an IB
pass_conditions: Investigator Brochure referenced with version or date
equivalent device document referenced

requirement: Protocol must include a formal risk-benefit assessment with justification
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning risk-benefit, risks and benefits, potential risks, anticipated benefits, or risk justification.
fail_conditions: no risk-benefit assessment found
risks mentioned but no benefit justification
section contains only generic placeholder text
pass_conditions: formal risk-benefit assessment present with supporting rationale

requirement: Protocol must specify adverse event and SAE reporting procedures and timelines
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning adverse events, AE, serious adverse events, SAE, safety reporting, reporting timelines, or reporting procedures.
fail_conditions: no adverse event reporting procedures found
AE section exists but no timelines specified
no distinction between AE and SAE reporting
pass_conditions: adverse event reporting procedures described with specific timelines
SAE reporting requirements and timelines clearly stated

requirement: Sample size must be justified with statistical rationale including power calculation
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning sample size justification, power calculation, statistical power, effect size, or sample size rationale.
fail_conditions: sample size stated but no statistical justification
no power calculation found
pilot study with no rationale for sample size
pass_conditions: sample size justified with power calculation and effect size
exploratory study with appropriate rationale explicitly stated

requirement: Protocol must include investigator qualifications section with CVs and training records
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning investigator qualifications, investigator CV, curriculum vitae, training records, or investigator credentials.
fail_conditions: no investigator qualifications section found
no reference to CVs or training records
section absent from protocol
pass_conditions: investigator qualifications section present with reference to CVs and training

requirement: Protocol must include delegation of authority log and staff qualification requirements
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning delegation of authority, delegation log, delegated tasks, or staff qualification documentation.
fail_conditions: no delegation of authority section found
no delegation log or reference
section absent from protocol
pass_conditions: delegation of authority log included or referenced
staff qualification requirements stated

requirement: Protocol must include a monitoring plan with frequency, scope, and oversight procedures
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning monitoring plan, site monitoring, monitoring visits, monitoring frequency, or study oversight.
fail_conditions: no monitoring plan section found
monitoring mentioned but no frequency or scope described
pass_conditions: monitoring plan present with frequency and scope described

requirement: Protocol must include DSMB charter or reference with composition and procedures
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning DSMB, Data Safety Monitoring Board, data monitoring committee, DMC, or safety monitoring charter.
fail_conditions: no DSMB section found
DSMB mentioned but composition not described
charter referenced but not described
pass_conditions: DSMB section present with composition and procedures
DSMB charter referenced with adequate detail

requirement: Protocol must include data management procedures covering validation, query resolution, and database lock
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning data management, data validation, query resolution, database lock, or data quality procedures.
fail_conditions: no data management section found
data management mentioned but no validation procedures
database lock procedure absent
pass_conditions: data management section covering validation and query resolution present
database lock procedure described
